settings.heading: Remote Business Partner membership for practical business access and support
settings.text: Membership is for business owners and operators who want a clearer route into practical resources, service pathways, marketplace context and support. Current availability, inclusions and joining options must be confirmed before relying on membership access.

settings.heading: What members can use RBP for
settings.text: Use this overview to understand possible membership value, then contact RBP to confirm current availability, inclusions and next steps.

settings.title: Business support access
settings.text: A clearer place to connect services, resources, offers and support pathways.

settings.title: Practical resource pathways
settings.text: Use Essentials, templates and toolkits to support repeatable business work.

settings.title: Partner and marketplace pathways
settings.text: Review partner offers and business opportunities only where active, public and available.

settings.title: Help choosing the next step
settings.text: Use support and advisory paths when the right product, service or plan is unclear.

settings.heading: Where membership connects across RBP
settings.text: Membership can support access across resources, service pathways, marketplace context and support routing when the relevant options are active and available.

settings.title: Essentials
settings.text: Templates, toolkits and supported resource options for repeatable business work.

settings.title: Advisory, consulting and implementation
settings.text: Use the service pathways when a member need moves beyond a self-serve resource.

settings.title: Marketplace and partner pathways
settings.text: Review active marketplace pathways and partner offers where available.

settings.heading: From interest to the right membership pathway
settings.text: Membership should make it clear whether a user can enquire now, confirm available options or contact support before choosing.

settings.title: Review the membership value
settings.text: Start with what membership includes and who it is designed for.

settings.title: Confirm current availability
settings.text: Ask RBP which membership options, inclusions and conditions are currently available.

settings.title: Complete enquiry
settings.text: Use contact support if the fit, availability or next step is unclear.

settings.title: Use confirmed pathways
settings.text: Access resources, services, offers and support only where the relevant option is active and configured.

settings.heading: Membership questions
settings.text: Use these answers to understand who membership is for, how it connects to RBP support, and where to compare plan details.

settings.question: Who is membership for?
settings.answer: Membership is for business owners and operators who want ongoing access to practical business pathways, resources, offers and support rather than a single isolated purchase.

settings.question: Do I join immediately or ask first?
settings.answer: Use the Membership page as the overview, then ask RBP to confirm available options, inclusions and application steps before joining or relying on member access.

settings.question: How does membership connect to support?
settings.answer: Membership can help route you to resources, services, partner pathways and support when those pathways are active and available.

settings.heading: Ask about membership
settings.text: Contact RBP to confirm current membership availability, inclusions, application steps and whether membership is the right pathway.
